headline: Assessing RTX (NYSE:RTX) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And Mixed Fair Value Signals
summary: How RTX’s Recent Returns Frame Today’s Valuation Debate RTX (RTX) has caught investor attention after a 0.7% move over the past day, with returns mixed over the past week and month but stronger over the past 3 months and year. See our latest analysis for RTX. With the share price at $204.52, RTX has pulled back over the past week after a 90 day share price return of 13.67%, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 57.5% suggests that momentum has been building rather than fading. headline: Anduril Joins List Of Key Army Suppliers, Wins $20 Billion Contract
summary: Drone-maker Anduril lands a $20 billion Army contract. Huntington is tapped for aircraft carrier decommissioning and RTX lands a $2 billion award.

headline: The 3 Best Monthly Dividend ETFs to Buy Today for Lifelong Passive Income
summary: Three monthly dividend ETFs split across a $300,000 portfolio can generate roughly $1,541 per month in passive income. That math matters to retirees because monthly payments align with how bills actually arrive: mortgage or rent, utilities, groceries, insurance. Quarterly dividends force you to mentally divide a lump sum across 90 days. Monthly payments remove that ... The 3 Best Monthly Dividend ETFs to Buy Today for Lifelong Passive Income

headline: RTX's Collins Aerospace initiates powertrain testing for Clean Aviation SWITCH project at the Grid
summary: Collins Aerospace has begun initial testing of the electric motor drive systems for the European Union's Clean Aviation SWITCH project, a key step towards demonstrating the hybrid-electric technology on a full-scale Pratt & Whitney GTF™ engine. Integrated lab tests of the hybrid-electric powertrain subsystem, including motor generators, controllers and power distribution systems, are taking place at "The Grid," Collins' advanced electric power systems lab in Rockford, Illinois. Collins Aerospace
